subcodes.title: Su'al va Javab (Questions and Answers)
subcodes.first_line: Question: Concerning the Most Great Festival. Answer: Most Great Festival commenceth late in the afternoon of the thirteenth day
subcodes.first_line_orig: سوال از عید اعظم جواب اول عید عصر ۱۳ ماه دوم از اشهر بیان است یوم اول و تاسع
subcodes.subjects: @grammar and orthography, @law of inheritance, @law of divorce, @law of fasting, @parents and children; youth; families, @laws of marriage and dowry, @business; financial; property matters, @law of obligatory prayer
